description: These slippers from catwalk are sure to decorate your feet - be it at college days or on family days. The loop around your big toe and the ankle strap hold the foot in place, allowing you to enjoy in comfort and style.UpperLeather strap around the big toe Leather strap around the ankle with a velcro strap enclosure for a customised FitStraps with textile lining for extreme comfortMidsoleFoam footbed for great supportOutsoleTextured rubber outsole for great gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush, using cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
